name: Turn Manager tolerates small typos in text replies
description: When a user replies to a single-choice check-in question with a small typo (e.g. 'midl' instead of 'mild'), the Turn Manager fuzzy-matches it to the intended option and continues the check-in without reprompting.

expectations.description: System does not reprompt after a fuzzy-matched typo
System accepts the typo answer and moves to the next question
Session completes and confirms Brief is ready
